name: theorem-context-claude
description: Out-of-band context compilation for Claude Code. UserPromptSubmit hook runs Theseus orchestrate before each model turn, injects a finished Context Artifact via stdout, records every action into a replayable harness run, and enforces Action Rail on tool use. Defaults to no-tool mode; /context-refresh and the orchestrate_refresh MCP tool are available as fallback when context goes stale mid-session.

theseus.description: Theseus knowledge graph (full Mode 3 surface, opt-in)
